Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Jiaojiadian Vehicle / VW-NJ.

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Jiaojiadian Vehicle Co., Ltd. represents a classic misclassification within the registry system. Officially tagged as an 'Automobile Complete Vehicle Manufacturer', the forensic reality completely contradicts this. With a paid-in capital of 12 million RMB and a workforce of only 15 insured employees (2024), it physically and financially lacks the immense capacity required for automobile manufacturing. Furthermore, its website domain (vw-nj.com) directly points to an automotive dealership affiliation (likely Volkswagen Nanjing). A deep dive into its business scope confirms its true operational status: it is an established 4S Automobile Dealership and Comprehensive Auto Services provider, engaged in new and used car sales, automotive repair, insurance agency services, and vehicle leasing, rather than a manufacturing plant.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 80)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / AUTO DEALERSHIP & SERVICE CENTER
